name: Apple Streusel Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Martha White Whole Wheat Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease muffin cups.
3. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flours, apple, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Beat egg in a separate bowl; stir in milk and oil.
5. Add liquid mixture to dry ingredients, stirring just until blended.
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each 2/3 full.
7. Sprinkle evenly with Streusel Topping.
8. Bake for 15 to 18 minutes or until golden brown.
